char_umeko_repair2: Hand-drawn watercolor portrait, 256x256px, transparent background. Character: Kirishima Umeko (桐島梅子). ABSOLUTE FIXED APPEARANCE FOR ALL VARIANTS — DO NOT CHANGE: (1) approximately 55-year-old Japanese woman, same age across ALL emotions; (2) dark hair with some grey streaks in a practical updo bun, a few strands loose from work — same bun shape every time; (3) bamboo green #7DBE77 pottery apron over a light cream blouse — always visible; (4) round warm mature face with prominent laugh lines around the eyes and mouth — same face shape; (5) slight forward-lean posture from decades of pottery work. Expression DEFAULT: calm direct gaze, slight upward tilt of assessment — she is reading you like clay. Warm pastel watercolor chibi style. No text baked in.

char_ritsu_portrait_happy: Hand-drawn watercolor dialogue portrait (bust shot: head + upper shoulders), 256x256px, transparent background. Character: Yamada Ritsu (山田律), 29-year-old Japanese male. ABSOLUTE FIXED APPEARANCE matching his default portrait: dark slightly disheveled short hair (NOT neat, NOT combed — the slightly messy hair of someone who was very stressed); light blue-grey rumpled dress shirt with rolled-up sleeves visible at shoulders; slightly lanky build; the same face structure as his neutral/default portrait. Expression HAPPY: wide open eyes with genuine surprise-delight, a real smile that cracked through his armor — the look of someone who didn't expect to feel good but does. Warm pastel watercolor chibi style. Transparent background. No text baked in. DO NOT change the hair to neat/combed. DO NOT change the shirt color.
